development-result.summary:
All implementation work is complete. All verification checks pass. The test-generated commits ("feat: add new file flow") have been removed from git history by deleting the filter-branch backup ref at refs/original/refs/heads/wt-69-paralel.
COMPLETED ACROSS ALL CONTINUATIONS:
Architecture: - Created mcp-server standalone crate with zero dependency on ralph-workflow - Defined adapter trait seam: HostSession, WorkspaceAdapter, AuditSink - McpServerConfig with root_dir, AccessMode, ToolFilter enforcement - AccessDecision type with AccessDeniedCode variants (ReadOnlyMode, OutsideRootDir, ToolNotAllowed, CapabilityDenied, NotInitialized) - McpCapability enum covering all 15 registered tools - Path normalization preventing parent traversal attacks
Tools (15 registered): read_file, write_file, list_directory, list_directory_recursive, search_files, git_status, git_diff, git_log, git_show, exec, ralph_submit_artifact, report_progress, declare_complete, read_env, coordinate
Safety Guardrails: - assert_no_real_git_mutations() and assert_no_real_git_state() in test-helpers - xtask audit-no-real-git-in-tests native check - All tests use TempDir workspaces, never project checkout paths - filter-branch backup ref removed: refs/original/refs/heads/wt-69-paralel deleted
FINAL VERIFICATION RESULTS: - cargo fmt --all --check: PASS - cargo clippy -p ralph-workflow -p ralph-workflow-tests -p test-helpers -p mcp-server --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings: PASS (0 errors) - cargo test -p mcp-server --test standalone_host: PASS (18/18) - cargo test -p ralph-workflow --lib mcp_server: PASS (116/116) - cargo test -p ralph-workflow-tests --test integration_tests: PASS (1267/1267) - cargo xtask verify: PASS (17/17 checks) - dep-isolation check (mcp-server has no ralph-workflow dependency): PASS - cargo doc -p mcp-server --no-deps: PASS (0 warnings) - cargo doc -p ralph-workflow --no-deps: PASS (0 warnings) - git log --oneline --all | grep "add new file flow": 0 matches (PASS)
development-result.files-changed: mcp-server/src/lib.rs — crate root with full RPC contract Rustdoc mcp-server/src/io/mod.rs — boundary IO module mcp-server/src/dispatch/mod.rs — dispatch layer with Rustdoc for all tools mcp-server/src/dispatch/access.rs — McpCapability, AccessDecision, ToolFilter, AccessDeniedCode mcp-server/src/dispatch/registry.rs — tool registry with 15 registered tools mcp-server/tests/standalone_host.rs — 18 standalone tests (no ralph-workflow dep) ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/session_bridge.rs — SessionBridge startup, RALPH_MCP_ENDPOINT injection ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tool_bridge.rs — McpServerConfig construction with repo root ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/audit_adapter.rs — AuditSink impl for ralph-workflow ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tool_artifact.rs — ralph_submit_artifact handler with Rustdoc ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tool_workspace.rs — file/directory tools with Rustdoc ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tool_git_read.rs — git read tools with Rustdoc ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tool_exec.rs — exec tool with Rustdoc ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tool_coordination.rs — coordination tools with Rustdoc ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tests/e2e_socket_behavior.rs — e2e socket tests with git safety guards ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tests/blacklist_tests.rs — blocklist enforcement tests ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tests/capability_tests.rs — capability check tests ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tests/snapshot_tests.rs — snapshot tests ralph-workflow/src/mcp_server/tests/tool_tests.rs — tool unit tests ralph-workflow/src/app/io/repo_discovery.rs — discover_repo_root() boundary module ralph-workflow/src/app/io/mod.rs — pub mod repo_discovery ralph-workflow/src/app/pipeline_setup.rs — SessionBridge integration with repo root discovery ralph-workflow/src/prompts/template_variables.rs — RALPH_MCP_ENDPOINT propagation ralph-workflow/src/prompts/templates/shared/_mcp_tools.txt — correct tool names (no ralph_ prefix drift) ralph-workflow/src/agents/harness/claude.rs — RALPH_MCP_ENDPOINT env injection ralph-workflow/src/agents/harness/mod.rs — harness MCP integration test-helpers/src/lib.rs — assert_no_real_git_mutations(), assert_no_real_git_state() tests/integration_tests/mcp_behavioral.rs — MCP behavioral integration tests tests/integration_tests/workflows/mcp_end_to_end.rs — end-to-end MCP workflow tests xtask/src/runtime/verify.rs — 17-check verify suite with mcp-server lanes and dep-isolation check xtask/src/boundary/compliance.rs — audit-no-real-git-in-tests native check xtask/src/io/scanner.rs — git mutation pattern scanner
development-result.next-steps: None. All plan requirements are satisfied and all verification passes.
